steps.expression: async () => { const refresh = await window.api.providers.refreshModelCatalog({ viewKind: 'settings' }); const view = await window.api.settings.getView({ viewKind: 'settings' }); if (!refresh.ok || !view.ok) { return { ok: false, refreshOk: refresh.ok, viewOk: view.ok }; } const gemini = view.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider.gemini ?? []; if (gemini.length === 0) { return { ok: false, reason: 'no-gemini-models' }; } const set = await window.api.settings.setGlobalDefaultModel({ viewKind: 'settings', modelRefOrNull: { providerId: 'gemini', modelId: gemini[0] } }); return { ok: set.ok, modelId: gemini[0], globalDefaultInvalid: set.ok ? set.value.globalDefaultModelInvalidConfig : null }; }

async () => { const listed = await window.api.agents.list({ viewKind: 'agentsList', searchText: '', tagFilter: '', sortBy: 'updatedAt', sortDirection: 'desc', page: 1 }); if (!listed.ok) { return { ok: false, reason: 'list-failed' }; } const target = listed.value.items.find((agent) => agent.invalidConfig); if (!target) { return { ok: false, reason: 'no-invalid-agent' }; } localStorage.setItem('diagTargetAgentId', target.id); localStorage.setItem('diagTargetAgentName', target.name); const rows = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('article.list-row')); const row = rows.find((item) => item.querySelector('h3')?.textContent?.trim() === target.name); if (!(row instanceof HTMLElement)) { return { ok: false, reason: 'target-row-not-found', id: target.id, name: target.name }; } const editButton = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('button')).find((button) => button.textContent?.trim() === 'Edit'); if (!(editButton instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { return { ok: false, reason: 'edit-button-not-found', id: target.id, name: target.name }; } editButton.click(); return { ok: true, id: target.id, name: target.name, modelRefOrNull: target.modelRefOrNull }; }

() => { const select = document.querySelector('#agent-model'); if (!(select instanceof HTMLSelectElement)) { return { ok: false, reason: 'missing-select' }; } return { ok: true, value: select.value, selectedLabel: select.selectedOptions[0]?.textContent ?? '', hasUnavailableOption: Array.from(select.options).some((option) => (option.textContent ?? '').startsWith('Unavailable (')) }; }

async () => { const targetName = localStorage.getItem('diagTargetAgentName') ?? ''; const listed = await window.api.agents.list({ viewKind: 'agentsList', searchText: targetName, tagFilter: '', sortBy: 'updatedAt', sortDirection: 'desc', page: 1 }); if (!listed.ok) { return { ok: false, reason: 'list-failed-after-save' }; } const target = listed.value.items.find((agent) => agent.name === targetName) ?? null; return { ok: true, targetName, total: listed.value.total, target: target ? { id: target.id, name: target.name, invalidConfig: target.invalidConfig, modelRefOrNull: target.modelRefOrNull } : null }; }
